source_pr.title: domain: fix data race in SchemaValidator
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
```
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z] WARNING: DATA RACE
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z] Read at 0x00c000022028 by goroutine 23:
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*testSuite).TestT()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/domain_test.go:106 +0xf1b
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*testSuite).TestT()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/domain_test.go:76 +0x631
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   runtime.call32()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /usr/local/go/src/runtime/asm_amd64.s:539 +0x3a
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   reflect.Value.Call()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /usr/local/go/src/reflect/value.go:321 +0xd3
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   github.com/pingcap/check.(*suiteRunner).forkTest.func1()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/pkg/mod/github.com/pingcap/check@v0.0.0-20190102082844-67f458068fc8/check.go:836 +0x9aa
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   github.com/pingcap/check.(*suiteRunner).forkCall.func1()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/pkg/mod/github.com/pingcap/check@v0.0.0-20190102082844-67f458068fc8/check.go:730 +0xc4
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z] Previous write at 0x00c000022028 by goroutine 78:
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*schemaValidator).Update()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/schema_validator.go:126 +0xca
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*Domain).Reload()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/domain.go:353 +0x618
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]   github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*Domain).loadSchemaInLoop()
[2019-11-11T09:27:10.013Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/domain.go:449 +0xd15
```

### What is changed and how it works?
Add a lock to synchronize the access.
